---
title: "Heir of Redclyffe, The By the author of “The Two Guardians,” “Henrietta’s Wish,” “The Kings of England.” 2 vols."
---

## Heir of Redclyffe, The By the author of “The Two Guardians,” “Henrietta’s Wish,” “The Kings of England.” 2 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1853
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John W Parker and Son, West Strand, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
